description.value:
Aspect life

Activate 2 (concentrate)

Frequency once per day

Effect Massive amounts of vitality energy surge forth. For 1 minute, you emit vitality energy in a @Template[emanation|distance:10] centered on you. At the end of your turn, you (if you are living) and allied living creatures in the emanation regain @Damage[10[healing]] Hit Points. If you or an allied creature would die due to an increased @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Dying] value, you can Dismiss the activation as a free action to prevent the death; if you do, their dying value doesn't increase.
